sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# id=14 is the white bottom part. Let me find its boundary to click on it
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['id'] == 14:
        print(f"id=14 boundary: {n['boundary']}")
        # Click somewhere in the white part
        # boundary gives corner points, let's estimate center
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        center_row = sum(rows) // len(rows)
        center_col = sum(cols) // len(cols)
        print(f"Estimated center: row={center_row}, col={center_col}")
        # Also check id=13 for comparison
        for m in seg['nodes']:
            if m['id'] == 13:
                print(f"id=13 boundary: {m['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
